sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ngai un! A tulmawh lapi’n, Vantung teng thawn hi;
Van mi’ la in van thawnin, gawsem tumin lasa uh a;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ngai un! Gualzawhna la aw, mun teng thawn
Tuihual bangin nuamna aw, hong ging zuazua.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pasian phat un, vantung mite aw;
Pa, Tapa le Kha Siangtho, phat den un aw.
bangin, Tatsa mite’n sa tawntung hi;
“Topa Kumpi hi” ci-in phat ding uh hi.
